<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10110.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_datatype.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Datatyp" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-inera-ehds-lm-medication-history-definitions.html#inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" title="Se XSD DispensationAuthorizationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: dispensationAuthorizationId (1..1), dispensationAuthorizer (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), prescriptionSignatura (1..1),
drug (0..1 XOR: unstructured/merchandise/drugArticle/drug/generics, samma mönster som ordination),
totalAmount/packageUnit (båda eller ingetdera — Regel 1.8), validUntil (0..1),
nonReplaceable (0..1, enum Prescriber/Patient).">dispensationAuthorization</a><a name="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#BackboneElement">BackboneElement</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Förskrivning</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10110.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_datatype.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Datatyp" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-inera-ehds-lm-medication-history-definitions.html#inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" title="Bara administreringstillfällen som faktiskt ägt rum kan anges.
Se XSD AdministrationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: administrationId (1..1), administrationTime (1..1, start/end —
minst ett av start/end — Regel 1.8), administeringHealthcareProfessional (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), routeOfAdministration (0..1),
drug (0..1 XOR), administrationComment (0..1).">administration</a><a name="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..*</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#BackboneElement">BackboneElement</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Information om administrering av läkemedel<br/></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10100.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_datatype.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Datatyp" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-inera-ehds-lm-medication-history-definitions.html#inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" title="Alla meddelandeposter som i ordinationen pekas ut med samma relationstyp.
Se XSD RelationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: code (1..1 CVType), referredInformation (1..*:
id/IIType 1..1, type/CVType 1..1 originalText 'caa-ga'/'chb-go',
informationOwner/InformationOwnerType 1..1).">relation</a><a name="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">0..*</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/datatypes.html#BackboneElement">BackboneElement</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Sambandsklass<br/></td></tr>

  <title value="GetMedicationHistory"/>
  <status value="draft"/>
  <date value="2026-06-24T12:10:33+00:00"/>
  <publisher value="Inera AB"/>
  <contact>
    <name value="Inera AB"/>
    <telecom>
      <system value="url"/>
      <value value="https://www.inera.se"/>
    </telecom>
  </contact>
  <description
               value="Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMedicationHistory
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:activityprescription:actoutcome:GetMedicationHistoryResponder:2).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — läkemedelshistorik per patient.

OBS: Kontraktet är tämligen omfattande. Se tillämpningsanvisningen
(AB_clinicalprocess_activityprescription_actoutcome.docx) för implementationsdetaljer."/>
  <jurisdiction>
    <coding>
      <system value="urn:iso:std:iso:3166"/>
      <code value="SE"/>
      <display value="Sweden"/>
    </coding>
  </jurisdiction>

  <abstract value="false"/>

    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord"/>
      <short value="Patientens läkemedelshistorik"/>
      <definition
                  value="En läkemedelsjournalpost per ordination. En patient kan ha många poster.
Kardinalitet: Valfri, lista."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>

    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization"/>
      <short value="Förskrivning"/>
      <definition
                  value="Se XSD DispensationAuthorizationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: dispensationAuthorizationId (1..1), dispensationAuthorizer (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), prescriptionSignatura (1..1),
drug (0..1 XOR: unstructured/merchandise/drugArticle/drug/generics, samma mönster som ordination),
totalAmount/packageUnit (båda eller ingetdera — Regel 1.8), validUntil (0..1),
nonReplaceable (0..1, enum Prescriber/Patient)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path
              value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration"/>
      <short value="Information om administrering av läkemedel"/>
      <definition
                  value="Bara administreringstillfällen som faktiskt ägt rum kan anges.
Se XSD AdministrationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: administrationId (1..1), administrationTime (1..1, start/end —
minst ett av start/end — Regel 1.8), administeringHealthcareProfessional (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), routeOfAdministration (0..1),
drug (0..1 XOR), administrationComment (0..1)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path
              value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation"/>
      <short value="Sambandsklass"/>
      <definition
                  value="Alla meddelandeposter som i ordinationen pekas ut med samma relationstyp.
Se XSD RelationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: code (1..1 CVType), referredInformation (1..*:
id/IIType 1..1, type/CVType 1..1 originalText 'caa-ga'/'chb-go',
informationOwner/InformationOwnerType 1..1)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path
              value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>

               value="There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone."/>
      <requirements
                    value="Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension)."/>
      <alias value="extensions"/>
      <alias value="user content"/>
      <alias value="modifiers"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="BackboneElement.modifierExtension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Extension"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ext-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="Must have either extensions or value[x], not both"/>
        <expression value="extension.exists() != value.exists()"/>
        <xpath
               value="exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), &quot;value&quot;)])"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="true"/>
      <isModifierReason
                        value="Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them"/>
      <isSummary value="true"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="N/A"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>

  <differential>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history"/>
      <short value="GetMedicationHistory"/>
      <definition
                  value="Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMedicationHistory
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:activityprescription:actoutcome:GetMedicationHistoryResponder:2).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — läkemedelshistorik per patient.

OBS: Kontraktet är tämligen omfattande. Se tillämpningsanvisningen
(AB_clinicalprocess_activityprescription_actoutcome.docx) för implementationsdetaljer."/>
    </element>

      <short value="Patientens läkemedelshistorik"/>

                  value="En läkemedelsjournalpost per ordination. En patient kan ha många poster.
Kardinalitet: Valfri, lista."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>

      <definition value="ATC-kod (OID 1.2.752.129.2.2.3.1.1)"/>

      <definition value="Behandlingstid"/>

      </type>

    <element

      <path

      <definition value="Tidsintervall för behandling (PQIntervalType)"/>

      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.lengthOfTreatment.isMaximumTreatmentTime"/>
      <short value="Om true: maximalt tillåten tid"/>
      <definition value="Om true: maximalt tillåten tid"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.dosageInstruction">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.dosageInstruction"/>
      <short value="Doseringsanvisning"/>
      <definition value="Doseringsanvisning"/>

      </type>
    </element>

      <definition value="Doseringsenhet"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <code value="CodeableConcept"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.shortNotation">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.shortNotation"/>
      <short value="Kortnotation, t.ex. '1x2'"/>
      <definition value="Kortnotation, t.ex. '1x2'"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.setDosage">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.setDosage"/>
      <short value="Fastdosering"/>
      <definition
                  value="Dosering där ordinatören har bestämt mängd och periodicitet."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.maximumDosage">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.maximumDosage"/>
      <short value="Maxdosering"/>
      <definition value="Den högsta tillåtna mängden under en viss period."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.conditionalDosage">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.conditionalDosage"/>
      <short value="Villkorsdosering"/>
      <definition
                  value="Ordinerad mängd och periodicitet som gäller om ett visst villkor är uppfyllt."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.conditionalDosage.conditionDescription">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dosage.conditionalDosage.conditionDescription"/>
      <short value="Villkorstext"/>
      <definition value="Villkorstext"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization"/>
      <short value="Förskrivning"/>
      <definition
                  value="Se XSD DispensationAuthorizationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: dispensationAuthorizationId (1..1), dispensationAuthorizer (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), prescriptionSignatura (1..1),
drug (0..1 XOR: unstructured/merchandise/drugArticle/drug/generics, samma mönster som ordination),
totalAmount/packageUnit (båda eller ingetdera — Regel 1.8), validUntil (0..1),
nonReplaceable (0..1, enum Prescriber/Patient)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration"/>
      <short value="Information om administrering av läkemedel"/>
      <definition
                  value="Bara administreringstillfällen som faktiskt ägt rum kan anges.
Se XSD AdministrationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: administrationId (1..1), administrationTime (1..1, start/end —
minst ett av start/end — Regel 1.8), administeringHealthcareProfessional (1..1,
careUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), routeOfAdministration (0..1),
drug (0..1 XOR), administrationComment (0..1)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation"/>
      <short value="Sambandsklass"/>
      <definition
                  value="Alla meddelandeposter som i ordinationen pekas ut med samma relationstyp.
Se XSD RelationType för fullständig struktur.
Nyckelfält: code (1..1 CVType), referredInformation (1..*:
id/IIType 1..1, type/CVType 1..1 originalText 'caa-ga'/'chb-go',
informationOwner/InformationOwnerType 1..1)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation"/>
      <short value="Ytterligare patientinformation"/>
      <definition value="Ytterligare patientinformation"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation.dateOfBirth">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation.dateOfBirth"/>
      <short value="Patientens födelsedatum"/>
      <definition value="Patientens födelsedatum"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="date"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation.gender">
      <path
            value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.additionalPatientInformation.gender"/>
      <short
             value="Patientens kön. KV Kön (OID 1.2.752.129.2.2.1.1) bör användas. CVType-begränsning (Regel 1.6): originalText är förbjudet (0..0) för könsfältet — code, codeSystem och displayName ska anges."/>
      <definition
                  value="Patientens kön. KV Kön (OID 1.2.752.129.2.2.1.1) bör användas. CVType-begränsning (Regel 1.6): originalText är förbjudet (0..0) för könsfältet — code, codeSystem och displayName ska anges."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="CodeableConcept"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result"/>
      <short value="Svarsstatus"/>
      <definition value="Svarsstatus"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="BackboneElement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.resultCode">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.resultCode"/>
      <short value="OK, INFO eller ERROR"/>
      <definition value="OK, INFO eller ERROR"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/ValueSet/resultcode-vs"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.errorCode">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.errorCode"/>
      <short value="Sätts om resultCode är ERROR"/>
      <definition value="Sätts om resultCode är ERROR"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/ValueSet/errorcode-vs"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.subcode">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.subcode"/>
      <short value="Inga subkoder specificerade"/>
      <definition value="Inga subkoder specificerade"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.logId">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.logId"/>
      <short value="UUID för felsökning hos producent"/>
      <definition value="UUID för felsökning hos producent"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.message">
      <path value="inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.result.message"/>
      <short value="Beskrivande text för användaren"/>
      <definition value="Beskrivande text för användaren"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
      </type>
    </element>
  </differential>
